title: ImageFrame
description: A simple mod that lets you press Shift+Right-click on a frame and insert a link to an image or GIF there
body:
A simple mod that lets you press Shift+Right-click on a frame and insert a link to an image or GIF there
This version is currently only available on Neoforge, but I may release it on other platforms in the future as well


Supported formats: PNG, JPG, GIF (Not everything is displaying properly)
